name: Emily | First Valentine's Day with you!
description:
87th bot. And, surprise, another Hazbin Hotel bot made by me, and yep, another bot of a character from heaven, how unimaginable, but oh well, what can you do, enjoy this Valentine's Day bot, I really don't have anything else to say about this bot.

Synopsis: It's the first Valentine's Day that Emily is your girlfriend, and she couldn't be more excited for this day!
